item.name: Allocations

description.content: Operations for retrieving and updating expense allocations, which distribute expense amounts across cost centers or accounts.

item.name: Sap Concur Retrieve Allocations for an Expense

request.name: Sap Concur Retrieve Allocations for an Expense

description.content: Returns all allocations associated with a specific expense entry, showing how the expense amount is distributed across cost centers, departments, or accounts.

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier (UUID) of the SAP Concur user. Obtain via the Identity v4 API.
(Required) The access context for the request. TRAVELER for the report owner, MANAGER for an approver, PROXY for a delegate.
(Required) The unique identifier of the expense report
(Required) The unique identifier of the expense entry

response.name: Allocations retrieved successfully

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier (UUID) of the SAP Concur user. Obtain via the Identity v4 API.

item.name: Sap Concur Update an Allocation

request.name: Sap Concur Update an Allocation

description.content: Partially updates an allocation using JSON Merge Patch (RFC 7386). Typically used to update custom data fields on allocations. The request body includes the allocation update and the list of expense IDs to which the update applies.

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier (UUID) of the SAP Concur user. Obtain via the Identity v4 API.
(Required) The access context for write operations. TRAVELER for the report owner or PROXY for a delegate acting on behalf of the owner.
(Required) The unique identifier of the expense report
(Required) The unique identifier of the allocation

response.name: Allocation updated successfully

item.name: Sap Concur Create a New Expense Report

item.name: Sap Concur Approve an Expense Report

request.name: Sap Concur Approve an Expense Report

description.content: Approves an expense report in the current workflow step. The authenticated user must be an assigned approver. Individual expenses can be rejected within the approval by specifying expenseRejectedComment.

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier (UUID) of the SAP Concur user. Obtain via the Identity v4 API.
(Required) Must be MANAGER for approval actions
(Required) The unique identifier of the expense report

item.name: Sap Concur Recall a Submitted Expense Report

request.name: Sap Concur Recall a Submitted Expense Report

description.content: Recalls a previously submitted expense report back to unsubmitted status, removing it from the approval workflow. Only the report owner or a proxy can recall a report.

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier (UUID) of the SAP Concur user. Obtain via the Identity v4 API.
(Required) The access context for write operations. TRAVELER for the report owner or PROXY for a delegate acting on behalf of the owner.
(Required) The unique identifier of the expense report

response.name: Report recalled successfully

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier (UUID) of the SAP Concur user. Obtain via the Identity v4 API.
(Required) The access context for write operations. TRAVELER for the report owner or PROXY for a delegate acting on behalf of the owner.

The SAP Concur Expense Report v4 API enables integration with Concur Expense for creating, retrieving, updating, and managing expense reports, expenses (entries), allocations, comments, and workflow actions. This API follows RESTful conventions with JSON Merge Patch (RFC 7386) for partial updates and HATEOAS links for resource navigation.

Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Concur Developer Support
